## Summary

A short description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## How to test

Steps the reviewer can follow to verify the change works.

## Screenshots

If the change is user-visible, attach before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` runs cleanly locally
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md) if user-visible
